source_description: Single post-#555 release-hardening mission for 3.1.1. Implements the seven core forward-correctness tracks from GitHub meta-issue #566 (init coherence, planning-artifact producer correctness, mission identity Phase 1, tasks/finalize hotfix, auth refresh race fix, top-level implement de-emphasis, repo dogfooding/version coherence). Track H / #401 deferred (CLI-only release). Historical kitty-specs/** archaeology out of scope. Working repo: /tmp/311/spec-kitty.
